title: Rubric Generator
description: Build a scoring rubric for an assignment with clear criteria and performance levels.
template: Help me build a grading rubric for a {assignmentType} assignment at {gradeLevel}. Use the following criteria: {criteria}. Then produce a rubric table with those criteria as rows and 4 performance levels as columns (e.g., Exemplary / Proficient / Developing / Beginning), with a short description in each cell.

fields.label: Criteria (3-5 items)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Claim clarity, Evidence quality, Organization, Grammar
